t: CoRoT (Convection, Rotation and planetary Transits) led by CNES (The Central National d'études Spatiales) is the first mission dedicated to detecting and studying new planets orbiting the stars.
h: CoRoT (Convection, Rotation and planetary Transits) led by CNES (The Central National d'études Spatiales) is the first mission dedicated to detecting and studying new planets orbiting the stars.
